\tzpentry{ID3396}{Rotating Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3396 introduces Rotating Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \mathcal{H}_{rotating} = \mathcal{H}_{classical} - \frac{\omega_{gyro}}{c^2}\int_V \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, d^3r $$
